name: complex::loop_in_branch::ref::direct
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const ready = ref(false); const enabled = ref(false); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { if (ready.value) { for (const item of [enabled.value]) { if (item) { payload.value; } } } });
